texto: The man was staring directly at him now, a curious expression on his face, half smiling, half quizzical. Instantly Eager had a sense of certainty far deeper than anything he had experienced so far. "I have it too!" he exclaimed. "I am a part of this Earth, aren't I? Just like the birds and the trees and the people - I am.""Om." said his companion.Unseen by them, a blossom fell.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Helen Fox: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The man was staring directly at him now, a curious expression on his face, half smiling, half qui…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, am, birds pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e birds.
